name: cx-design-gate
description: Conversation-first visual design gate for AI-driven UI workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Gate AI UI work before implementation passes.
interface.longDescription: CX Design Gate provides conversation-first UI direction, Lazyweb and Mobbin reference lanes, Evidence Boards, Visual Fidelity Contracts, State Capsules, Self-Review gates, version reports, hard fail rules, score caps, and handoff/review prompts for AI-driven UI design workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Design Gate for this screen. Accept short human direction without requiring request_type, infer the current intent, resolve requirements and optional default calibration, run Lazyweb and Mobbin as parallel reference lanes, create Evidence Board, Synthesis, State Capsule, and Self-Review outputs, and stop with Input blocked or Reference research blocked when required inputs or sources are unavailable. For implementation review, compare screenshots or recordings against the Visual Fidelity Contract before acceptance.
